title: Syscall JIT smoke tests without cross-module asserts

source.subject: fix(corelib_tests): syscall JIT smoke tests without cross-module asserts

body:
Syscall-backed JIT smoke tests run without cross-module assertions that previously failed under tier-separated assemblies.

## Platform specification

- **Panic, I/O, and syscalls** — `/platform-spec/execution/runtime/panic-io-and-syscalls` — *implements* (required)

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `corelib`
- **Commit:** [`36778ec`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid_standard/commit/36778ec)
- **Subject:** fix(corelib_tests): syscall JIT smoke tests without cross-module asserts
- **Completed:** 2026-05-24

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.3 (Macros, concurrency, and stabilization)
- **Workstream:** `stabilization`
- **Domain:** `core-library`
- **Deliverable:** `v03-post-merge-ci`

## Relation
Contributes to deliverable **CI and integration hardening** (`v03-post-merge-ci`). Normative spec: **Panic, I/O, and syscalls** (*implements*).
